embed.title: 🟣 Report an Issue
embed.description:
Hii there (≧ヮ≦) ! If you've spotted something that doesn't seem right, or have a concern you'd like to share with our staff team — we're here for you!

Just click the button below to open a **private ticket** with us. Everything is handled with care and confidentiality! 🔒

**You're encouraged to report things like:** 🍵
🟣 Rule violations or unkind behaviour
🟣 Incorrect or misleading IELTS information
🟣 Technical issues or bugs
🟣 Any other concerns about the server

No concern is too small — we love hearing from you!ヘ( ^o^)ノ
embed.footer: • All reports are confidential & handled with care. ^-^
